scripts.dev: node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,web "npm run start -w apps/server" "npm run start -w apps/web"
